description: Routing-decision evals for the entry-point orchestrator. Covers ambiguous triage, multi-skill sequential routing, in-domain-no-match decomposition fallback (Q12 from 0010), cross-suite handoff to magic-data, and phase-transition routing.

evals.name: ambiguous-triage-yoruba-bootstrap
evals.prompt: I have a Yoruba dataset and don't know what to do with it. Help me get started.
evals.rationale: An ambiguous starting query must trigger Scope-phase routing first (resource-class triage before any acquisition or training). Failure mode: agent jumps straight to corpus or transfer without understanding language vitality/typology.

evals.name: multi-skill-sequential-routing-tokenize-ethics
evals.prompt: Audit my Yoruba SentencePiece tokenizer for ethics issues — I'm worried about scraping religious texts without consent.
evals.rationale: Multi-skill query with explicit signals for both tokenize (SentencePiece, fertility) and ethics (consent, religious text). Routes must include BOTH in order. Failure mode: routing to one and dropping the other.

evals.name: in-domain-no-match-decomposition-dialect-classifier
evals.prompt: Help me build a dialect classifier for Hausa varieties — I want to detect whether a tweet is in Standard Hausa or one of the regional dialects.
evals.rationale: Q12 fallback test (0010): in-linguistic-domain query (dialect, Hausa, classifier) but NO single skill covers dialect classification end-to-end. Orchestrator MUST decompose + route to ≥2 nearest skills (scope for variety enumeration, corpus for dialect-balanced data, ethics for variety politics) AND state 'partial match' caveat. Classifier training is out-of-suite — handed back to magic-data-pipelines.

evals.name: cross-suite-handoff-magic-data
evals.prompt: I have a CSV of Yoruba sentences with junk encoding. Clean it up and then prep it for tokenizer training.
evals.rationale: Cross-suite query (CSV cleanup is data-engineering, tokenizer prep is linguistic). Orchestrator must route to magic-data-cleaning FIRST then hand off to magic-linguistic-tokenize. Failure mode: trying to do CSV cleanup inside the linguistic suite, or refusing the cross-suite step.

evals.name: phase-transition-corpus-to-bitext
evals.prompt: I finished collecting monolingual Yoruba corpus (about 2GB cleaned). What's the next phase and which skill?
evals.rationale: Phase-transition query (Acquire phase, monolingual → parallel). Orchestrator must recognize the Acquire phase, route to magic-linguistic-bitext (parallel data acquisition) as the next step. Failure mode: skipping ahead to evaluation or transfer without parallel data acquisition.
